prose.en: Link individual identity to receipt of output from output devices.

guidance.en: Methods for linking individual identity to the receipt of output from output devices include installing security functionality on facsimile machines, copiers, and printers. Such functionality allows organizations to implement authentication on output devices prior to the release of output to individuals.

prose.en: individual identity is linked to the receipt of output from output devices.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of output devices and associated outputs requiring physical access controls
physical access control logs or records for areas containing output devices and related outputs
Organizational personnel with physical access control responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Organizational processes for access control to output devices
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing access control to output devices
